data.content: Approved implementation review. Verified the acceptance field is first-class across schema/cache upserts, create/update CLI/write-dispatch plumbing, knot.acceptance_set event emission plus rehydration and sync application, and prompt rendering so acceptance criteria appear in action prompts. Acceptance-focused tests cover create/update round-trip, rehydrate from events, sync application, and CLI flag parsing. make sanity passed on 2026-03-22 with fmt, clippy, full test suite, and 95.18% coverage.
